labels.meaning: Pure observation — ls, cat, git status, gh pr view, grep, find
Writes but NOT repo source — .git internals, npm/yarn install, mkdir/rmdir, em-store episode writes
Repo-source content write or cannot-tell — redirect-to-file, non-allowlisted node/python/ruby, cp/mv/dd, worktree-mutating git, curl -o, tee
Publishes/mutates shared external state — git push, gh pr create/merge/close, gh issue create/close, gh release, gh api POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE
Gate-control deadlock-prevention — writes/removes .checkpoints/.* marker files at canonical paths
Cannot tokenize safely — bash -c, eval, $(), backticks, unbalanced quotes, ambiguous heredoc
Parsed cleanly but unrecognized command shape — default_write or interpreter_other reason

non_overridable_rationale.unsafe_complex: Safety fail-closed. A plugin that redefines unsafe_complex as read_only would allow eval/bash -c/subshells through the gate unexamined.
non_overridable_rationale.marker_write: Gate infrastructure deadlock-prevention. marker_write is the escape hatch that allows agents to write .pre-checkpoint-done / .post-checkpoint-done / .plan-approval-pending markers. A plugin that misclassifies a marker write as shared_write creates an unrecoverable deadlock (deadlock class 1).
